title: “We no longer have free speech”: Sneako compares Chud the Builder backlash to Charlie Kirk debate after shocking Tennessee arrest case
summary_full: Sneako reacted strongly after Chud the Builder’s Tennessee arrest, calling it a dangerous moment for free speech rights. Meanwhile, authorities charged Dalton Eatherly with attempted murder and other firearm-related offenses after a courthouse shooting in Clarksville. The incident has now started a heated online debate involving hate speech, violence, constitutional rights, and comparisons to Charlie Kirk.
